creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
www/linux-nvu requires devel/linux-glib2, even if linux_base-f8 is
	installed.
	linux_base-f8 installs /compat/linux/lib/libgobject-2.0.so.0,
	and /compat/linux/usr/lib/libgobject-2.0.so.0 does not exist.
	linux_base-f8 conflicts linux-glib2, therefore installing
	linux-glib2 by depencency fails.

Fix: here is a patch (be careful about a file to patch):
